images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese idol, captured in a surprising expression with wide, expressive eyes and slightly parted lips. An intricate black velvet choker accentuates her slender neck as she stands in an abandoned factory, wearing a vintage French floral sundress with delicate lace trim and a form-fitting silk bodice that highlights her curvy silhouette. Shot in a classic black and white grade, the scene creates a stark, high-contrast luxury aesthetic despite the gritty surroundings. She holds a transparent umbrella, looking as if just noticing the viewer, embodying a moment of candid delight. The background features the industrial textures of the factory melting into a creamy bokeh, focusing entirely on her flawless skin texture, visible pores, and the captivating intensity of her gaze. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination, soft cinematic lighting.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup

A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model exuding a cyberpunk idol aesthetic amidst a city night atmosphere. She is illuminated by bright, professional dual-tone neon blue and pink lighting that creates a high-contrast, avant-garde feel without casting harsh shadows. Clad in a form-fitting, glossy ski suit that accentuates her slim waist and curvaceous figure, the sporty fabric textures are rendered with exquisite detail. The camera angle is a dynamic bottom-up view from the shoe perspective, capturing her standing tall before a towering wall of books in a reading corner, the shelves blurred into a soft bokeh. Her expression is one of determined focus and adventurous spirit, looking past the camera with intensity, while a pet dog rests near her feet. The image is shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, featuring desaturated muted color grading, ray tracing, and global illumination for ultimate clarity.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
